title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Alex Hormozi structures AI usage around four pillars: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow segmentation, and compounding effects. The analysis includes a cautionary tale about a team mistake at Acquisition.com that required executive correction.
